items.name: Soft Orange Glossy Dewy Blush Glow
items.description: Soft Orange Glossy Dewy Blush Glow adds a fresh, radiant flush with a luminous finish. Featuring soft orange tones paired with a glossy, dewy shine, this blush creates a healthy, hydrated glow that feels natural yet beautifully enhanced.

items.name: Soft Peach Glittery Gloss Blush Glow
items.description: Soft Peach Glittery Gloss Blush Glow adds a radiant, sparkling flush to your look! Featuring soft peach tones with a glossy finish and subtle glitter highlights, this blush creates a glowing, luminous effect that feels fresh, playful, and eye-catching.
